\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$ represents the phase of a dominant external perturber (e.g., a giant planet). \subsection{Distance-Weighted Coupling} Mutual interactions are assumed to decay with radial separation and are normalized by the system size: \begin{equation} K_{ij} = \frac{K_0}{N}\, \frac{\exp\!\big(-|r_i-r_j|/L\big)}{|r_i-r_j|+\varepsilon}, \label{eq:pairwise_coupling} \end{equation} where $
